applied_optimizations.name: torch.compile
applied_optimizations.description: Applied torch.compile(mode='default') to the ModelNew class for graph optimization and kernel fusion

applied_optimizations.name: Environment optimization
applied_optimizations.description: Set GPU_MAX_HW_QUEUES=2, HIP_FORCE_DEV_KERNARG=1, HSA_NO_SCRATCH_RECLAIM=1, AMD_LOG_LEVEL=0, PYTORCH_TUNABLEOP_ENABLED=1, TORCH_BLAS_PREFER_HIPBLASLT=1, unset TORCHINDUCTOR_MAX_AUTOTUNE

attempted_but_failed.name: Custom Triton kernels for BN+tanh, maxpool, groupnorm
attempted_but_failed.reason: Correctness issues - output mismatch with reference model
attempted_but_failed.error: Max diff ~6.0, likely due to random seed divergence in parameter initialization

notes: Baseline PyTorch implementation passes correctness checks
Transposed convolution GEMM is the dominant bottleneck at 78.2%
mode='max-autotune' caused 4x slowdown - avoid on ROCm
Custom Triton kernels for elementwise ops showed correctness issues likely due to random seed handling
Further optimization would require custom Triton kernel for transposed conv or better GEMM tuning

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_4
attempted_but_failed.reason: Trial 4 produced no output — 3 consecutive failures where the agent gets stuck on complex implementations without running the benchmark. Providing extremely concrete, minimal-change instructions to av

attempted_but_failed.name: trial_5
attempted_but_failed.reason: 5th trial with no output — 4 consecutive failures. Agent keeps getting stuck on complex implementations without ever running the benchmark. Giving ultra-prescriptive step-by-step instructions with exa
